description_long: This chest of drawers features a modern, minimalist design with a rectangular form and clean lines. The exterior is finished in a light wood grain, with the front panels in a smooth, matte white. The front side displays two upper drawers and two lower cabinet doors, each with small, round, dark-colored knobs for easy access. The top surface is flat and spacious, suitable for placing decorative items or everyday objects. The sides and top showcase a consistent wood grain pattern, while the back is not visible. The overall construction suggests a sturdy, functional piece suitable for urban interiors such as apartments, offices, or lobbies.
description: A modern chest of drawers with a light wood grain frame, matte white front panels, and small round knobs. It features two drawers and two cabinet doors, offering both storage and a clean, minimalist look.
description_view_0: Front view showing two large white doors with a central vertical seam and no visible handles.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the light wood grain texture and the depth of the chest, with no visible drawers or doors.
description_view_2: Alternate front view revealing two upper drawers and two lower cabinet doors, each with small round knobs.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, identical to view 1, showing the wood grain texture and depth.
